items.title: TEAMSTERS CALIFORNIA, CALIFORNIA LABOR FEDERATION CALL ON GOVERNOR NEWSOM TO SIGN AB 288
items.description: Following a vote by the California Senate to pass Assembly Bill 288 (AB 288), Teamsters California and the California Federation of Labor Unions are urging Gov. Gavin Newsom to sign the bill — the most significant labor legislation since the passage of the National Labor Relations Act (NLRA) in 1935.
